qa.overall_assessment: Iteration 3 resolved OBJ-3 (JSON validity), OBJ-4 (allOf inheritance model), and OBJ-5 (AC6 two explicit git diff commands). Codex adversarial review (gpt-5.5, xhigh) surfaced three new blocking defects: (A) AC1 line 121 incorrectly claims finding_deterministic has additional required fields - the actual schema has NO required list in finding_deterministic allOf[1]; (B) AC1b WHEN clause only targets lines 243 and 255 but issues[] is also described as a canonical channel at line 316; (C) AC6 second check (git diff --quiet HEAD -- commands/dev.md agents/pm.md exits 0) will fail on a correct implementation because both files already have pre-existing working-tree modifications (exit code 1 confirmed).

OBJ-3.original: context JSON invalid (CJK curly-quote characters at line 7).

OBJ-4.original: AC1 line 120 instructed direct ref to finding_base which would strip channel-specific constraints.
OBJ-4.verification: AC1 line 120 now correctly describes allOf inheritance: new fields added ONLY to finding_base.properties/required; channel ref pointers NOT changed; typed definitions inherit via allOf. CONFIRMED.

OBJ-5.original: AC6 had ambiguous diff recipe in dirty working tree.
OBJ-5.verification: AC6 now has two explicit git diff commands. Check (2) has new defect -- see OBJ-6C.

out_of_scope_observations.observation: Codex C5: AC3/AC4 do not add structured location to product-owner/user. Browser-only agents by design; accepted constraint per Edge Cases. Not a spec gap.

Codex C6: SARIF v2.1.0 does not define location.selector as a literal field; selector is from axe-core. BA Contract C slightly overclaims field provenance. Minor accuracy issue in reference documentation only; does not affect ACs.

objections.title: AC1 line 121 incorrectly asserts finding_deterministic has additional required fields
objections.claim: ticket:121: finding_deterministic typed definitions remain fully intact with their own additional required fields (axe_impact/computed_value/expected_value for deterministic; requires_human for contextual; category/severity_capped_at/advisory for aesthetic)
objections.problem: Confirmed via skills/ui-shared/report-schema.json inspection: finding_deterministic allOf[1] has a 'properties' key ONLY -- NO 'required' key. axe_impact, computed_value, expected_value are optional properties. finding_contextual allOf[1] DOES have required: [requires_human] and finding_aesthetic allOf[1] DOES have required: [category, severity_capped_at, advisory]. AC1 parenthetical incorrectly frames deterministic fields as required, contradicting the actual schema.
objections.required_evidence: BA must correct AC1 line 121 to accurately reflect that finding_deterministic allOf[1] has NO required list (optional properties only), while finding_contextual requires [requires_human] and finding_aesthetic requires [category, severity_capped_at, advisory].

evidence.verification_result: python3 json.load inspection: finding_deterministic allOf[0] keys=['$ref'], allOf[1] keys=['properties'] (no 'required' key in allOf[1])
evidence.contrast: finding_contextual allOf[1] has required=['requires_human']; finding_aesthetic allOf[1] has required=['category','severity_capped_at','advisory']

objections.title: AC1b WHEN clause targets only lines 243 and 255 but issues[] canonical-channel language also appears at line 316
objections.claim: AC1b WHEN: WHEN dev reads line 243 and the example JSON block at line 255
objections.problem: agents/ui-specialist.md:316 also describes issues[] as one of the 6 canonical channels (in codex_consult output documentation section): 'The codex_consult field MUST appear inside the required single json fenced block as a top-level metadata sibling of the 6 canonical channels (app_understanding, live_testing, design_quality, quality_gate_results, issues[], design_enhancements[])'. A dev following the WHEN clause literally will fix lines 243 and 255 but not line 316. The THEN clause broadly says does NOT describe issues[] as a canonical top-level findings channel -- but WHEN anchors to only two lines. Line 316 will remain stale, causing AC1b THEN to fail during QA verification.
objections.required_evidence: BA must expand AC1b WHEN clause to include line 316, or broaden to cover all Output Format section and codex_consult documentation section occurrences.

evidence.line_316_text: The codex_consult field MUST appear inside the required single json fenced block as a top-level metadata sibling of the 6 canonical channels (app_understanding, live_testing, design_quality, quality_gate_results, issues[], design_enhancements[])
evidence.grep_result: grep -n 'canonical channels' agents/ui-specialist.md hits lines 243, 316 (plus issues[] at 255)

objections.title: AC6 second git diff check is a false-fail gate due to pre-existing working-tree changes
objections.claim: AC6: AND git diff --quiet HEAD -- commands/dev.md agents/pm.md exits 0
objections.problem: Both commands/dev.md and agents/pm.md already have pre-existing modifications in the working tree (git status shows both as M). Confirmed: git diff --quiet HEAD -- commands/dev.md agents/pm.md exits 1. If dev correctly does NOT touch these files during this cycle, AC6 second check still exits 1. False-fail gate on a correct implementation.
objections.required_evidence: BA must rewrite AC6 second check as commit-scoped verification: WHEN dev applies changes as an atomic commit, git show --name-only HEAD confirms neither commands/dev.md nor agents/pm.md was included in the commit.

evidence.command: git diff --quiet HEAD -- commands/dev.md agents/pm.md; echo EXIT_CODE=$?
evidence.git_status: Both M commands/dev.md and M agents/pm.md shown as modified in working tree

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 7 findings. 3 incorporated as blockers: (C1) AC1 line 121 falsely claims finding_deterministic has additional required fields -- confirmed no required list; (C2) AC1b WHEN clause misses line 316; (C4) AC6 second check exits 1 due to pre-existing changes. 1 logged as observation (C3: location subfields not explicitly required -- acceptable). 1 out_of_scope (C5: PO/user location shape -- accepted design). 2 observation_only (C6: SARIF overclaims; C7: BA-QA FAIL artifact -- updated by this report).

findings_classified.disposition: logged as observation -- not blocking. All location sub-fields nullable by design; spec intent is unambiguous from prose.
logged in out_of_scope_observations. PO/user browser-only by design; accepted constraint.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: OBJ-6A from C1, OBJ-6B from C2, OBJ-6C from C4. C3 logged as observation. C5/C6 in out_of_scope_observations. C7 resolved.

required_ba_changes: CRITICAL (OBJ-6A): Fix AC1 line 121 -- change parenthetical to accurately reflect that finding_deterministic allOf[1] has NO required list. Accurate: AND finding_deterministic typed definition remains fully intact with axe_impact/computed_value/expected_value as optional properties in allOf[1] (no additional required list); finding_contextual allOf[1] retains required:[requires_human]; finding_aesthetic allOf[1] retains required:[category,severity_capped_at,advisory]

CRITICAL (OBJ-6B): Expand AC1b WHEN clause to include line 316. Change 'WHEN dev reads line 243 and the example JSON block at line 255' to also cover the codex_consult output documentation section (around line 316) so all three stale issues[]-as-canonical-channel occurrences are in scope.

CRITICAL (OBJ-6C): Rewrite AC6 second check as commit-scoped verification: WHEN dev applies this cycle changes as an atomic commit, git show --name-only HEAD confirms neither commands/dev.md nor agents/pm.md was included in the commit. Replace the git diff --quiet check which is a false-fail gate in a dirty working tree.
items_not_requiring_change: OBJ-5 fix correct in principle; AC6 recipe needs rewrite only (OBJ-6C)

summary.release_recommendation: reject -- fix three blocking defects (AC1 line 121, AC1b line 316 coverage, AC6 dirty-tree false-fail) before dev starts
